LAW AND MOTION, DEFENDANT BENJAMIN P. CHIU'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST STATE FACTS WITH MORE PARTICULARITY AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (MISREPRESENTATION). AS TO THE GROUNDS THAT DEFENDANT'S STATEMENTS ARE OPINION AND NOT ACTIONABLE, THIS IS A QUESTION OF FACT THAT IS NOT DECIDED ON A DEMURRER. DEMURRER OVERRULED ON THIS GROUND. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) (302)

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST STATE FACTS WITH MORE PARTICULARITY AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (MISREPRESENTATION). AS TO THE GROUNDS THAT DEFENDANT'S STATEMENTS ARE OPINION AND NOT ACTIONABLE, THIS IS A QUESTION OF FACT THAT IS NOT DECIDED ON A DEMURRER. DEMURRER OVERRULED ON THIS GROUND. (Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
